title: The Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992
full_text: The Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 भारतीय पुनर्वास परिषद् अधिनियम, 1992 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1992-34 Act Number: 34 Enactment Date: 1992-09-01 Act Year: 1992 Short Title: The Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 Hindi Title: भारतीय पुनर्वास परिषद् अधिनियम, 1992 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of the Rehabilitation Council of India for regulating and monitoring the training of rehabilitation professionals and personnel, promoting research in rehabilitation and special education, the maintenance of a Central Rehabilitation Register and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment Department: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Enforcement Date: 31-07-1993 Notification: 31st July, 1993, vide notification No. S.O. 288(E), dated 28th April, 1993, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE REHABILITATION COUNCIL OF INDIA CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF THE COUNCIL Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution and incorporation of Rehabilitation Council of India. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Term of office of Chairperson and members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Disqualifications. Section 6. Vacation of office by members. Section 7. Executive Committee and other committees. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Member-Secretary and employees of Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Vacancies in the Council not to invalidate acts, etc. Section 10. Dissolution of Rehabilitation Council and transfer of rights, liabilities and employees of Rehabilitation Council to Council. Section 11. Recognition of qualifications granted by University, etc., in India for rehabilitation professionals. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Recognition of qualifications granted by institutions outside India. Section 13. Rights of persons possessing qualifications included in the Schedule to be enrolled. Section 14. Power to require information as to courses of study and examinations. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Inspectors as examinations. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Visitors at examinations. Section 17. Withdrawal of recognition. Section 18. Minimum standards of education. Section 19. Registration in Register. Section 20. Privileges of persons who are registered on Register. Section 21. Professional conduct and removal of names from Register. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Appeal against order of removal from Register. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Register. Section 24. Information to be furnished by Council and publication thereof. Section 25. Cognizance of offences. Section 26. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 27. Employees of Council to be public servants. Section 28. Power to make rules. Section 29. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Laying of rules and regulations before Parliament. Schedule 1.
